1.content:
Frank reluctantly rolled out of bed. It was his last day of freedom before his new job as a mall Santa. At 62, he certainly looked the part. He was 5’8”, 300 pounds with a big round belly, and a big, thick, bushy white beard.

“At least with social distancing the kids won’t be within six feet of me,” he mumbled, placing a fresh Marlboro between his lips. He lit the cigarette and let it dangle, slipping on a fresh pair of boxers, when he heard a knock at the door.

“Ugh. Who the hell needs something at this hour.”

Frank made his way to the door and looked out the peephole, but saw no one. He peeped through the blinds, no one near.

“Damn kids,” he though. He then spotted a small brown box with a card on it placed neatly on the worn mat in front of his door.

Frank opened the door. The cold air rushed over his hairy belly, making him shiver. He grabbed the box and went inside, sitting down out the couch. He stubbed out his cigarette and lit up a fresh one. As a three pack a day smoker, he certainly wasn’t looking forward to spending hours around kids dressed up as Santa without a chance to smoke.

Frank opened the card and read it aloud, the cigarette bouncing between his lips as he spoke.

“Dear Frank. The North Pole would like to thank you for your service as a mall Santa. The job can be tough to navigate at times, so we’ve sent one of our best elves, Mike, to be of assistance. Again, we thank you greatly.”

Frank sat the card down and looked at the small box.

“An elf, huh?”

He opened the box and looked inside. He saw a man who was only about an inch tall, dressed in a bright green shorts and a t-shirt.

“Hello Frank!”

Frank shut the box quickly.

“What the fuck...”

He reopened it slowly.

“Sorry there Frank, didn’t mean to scare you! I’m Mike, an elf from the North Pole!”

“You’re... you’re tiny.”

“Yup, sure am! Elves come in all different sizes depending on the job. As a mall Santa helper, I have to small enough to not be seen by the children.”

“How... how do you help exactly?”

“Well, it’s simple. When you go to work, you’ll hide me somewhere the kids can’t see me! A lot of Santa’s choose to stick me in their beards. Then when a kid asks a tough question, I can send you the answer telepathically.”

“That’s insane. Is this real?”

“Very real Frank! The telepathic link is why you can hear me even though I’m so small. You’re the only person who can hear me. After Christmas you simply mail me back to the North Pole.”

Frank was in disbelief. He crushed out his cigarette and lit a fresh one. He heard the tiny elf cough.

“So what do I do with you when I’m not working?”

“Well I don’t take up much space, so it shouldn’t be hard to figure out. I’ll also help keep you in the Christmas spirit!”

The Christmas spirit was something Frank didn’t have. He’d never had kids, and often spent the holiday alone.

Frank slowly reached into the box and grabbed the inch tall Mike between his thumb and forefinger. He rolled him between his fingers a few times.

“Wow. You feel real...”

He brought the tiny elf closer to his face to get a good look at him. Smoke wafted up from the cigarette, and again Mike coughed. Frank chuckled.

“Not a smoker I guess?”

“No, never tried it - they don’t really make cigarettes for people my size.”

“Well, I guess you’ll be of help. I’m iffy about the mall Santa thing, but figured a little extra money wouldn’t hurt. First day is tomorrow, so today is for relaxing. Hope you like football.”

Frank clicked on the TV and put a football game on. He took the tiny elf and sat him on his massive belly.
1.title: The Beginning

choices: Frank puts Mike on his cig
Frank puts Mike in his beard
Frank puts Mike back on his belly
11.content:
Frank’s eyes moved back and forth from the football game to the tiny man on his belly. He was still having trouble believing the elf was real. He assumed he’d wake up and it’d all be a dream. The tiny man said nothing, he merely sat on Frank’s mountainous gut and watched the game.

Frank took a final drag off of his cigarette. He blew a warm torrent of smoke down on Mike as he stubbed it out. Mike didn’t move, but coughed rather dramatically. This made Frank chuckle again. When he did, his belly shook and sent the tiny man tumbling forward. Frank quickly placed his hand down over the tiny man, pressing into his soft, fuzzy belly and stopping his fall.

He could feel Mike squirming, and it felt very intriguing. He rolled Mike around on his belly, pausing every few seconds to push him deep into his flesh, before rolling him around in his thick hair again.

As his right hand continued to play with Mike, Frank lit a fresh cigarette with his left. Frank slowly uncovered the tiny man and lifted him up to his face. He took a long drag off of his cigarette and coated the tiny elf with smoke. Mike coughed but said nothing.
11.title: They watch football

choices: Frank keeps Mike in his beard
112.content:
“You don’t say much...”

“As a Santa helper I’ve been trained to be submissive to my Santa. So I guess I’m just trained to not really comment on things.”

“So when you’re not helping a mall Santa you’re in training?”

“Somewhat. A lot of mall Santas choose to keep their elves and not send them back. So we’re always training new elves, and that’s what I currently do at the North Pole. But I missed being in the field so I applied to assist a Santa this year.”

Frank took another long drag on his cigarette and again blew his smoke on the tiny elf. He then took Mike and pushed him deep into his thick white beard.

“So this is where you like spending your time?”

“Beards are common hiding places for elves, but I’ve been kept other places too. A few Santas kept me under their hats. A couple kept me in their underwear.”

This made Frank laugh.

“There was one who kept me in his beard while he was working, but at home kept me in his armpit.”

“I can tell you don’t care for smoking. I guess I’m the first smoking santa?”

“No, probably 25% of the Santas I’ve worked with smoke.”

Frank took another drag and exhaled lazily into the air. He could feel the elf moving in his beard. It felt oddly nice.

“Since you’re in there, how about you look around for any crumbs or fuzz and get my beard good and clean. Santa can’t have a dirty beard, right?”

The elf said nothing, but Frank could feel him immediately go to work. Frank could feel tiny crumbs bouncing onto his belly as Mike tossed them out of the beard. After a few minutes the movement slowed.

“Looks like it’s all clean in here.”
112.title: Frank puts Mike in his beard

choices: Frank puts Mike in the ashtray
Frank decides to eat some food
1121.content:
“Keep crawling around, it feels nice.”

The elf obliged and kept crawling around in the thick beard. Frank was still trying to grasp if this was real, and was still expecting to wake up at any moment, realizing this was a dream. Elves aren’t real and people aren’t an inch tall, but it all felt real.

“Any other fun places Santas liked to keep you?”

“There have been a lot, honestly. I had one who kept me between his toes. One under his belly. One kept me in a drawer when he wasn’t working, but kept me under his balls when he was...”

“Under his balls? All of these are interesting. I feel like I need to try them all.”

“I’ve had a couple that kept me in their mouth.”

“You’d be doing a lot of coughing in my mouth,” Frank laughed, lighting a fresh cigarette. “Did you object to any of this?”

“It’s hard to object to anything when you’re an inch tall. Plus, my part of my job is to help keep the Santas happy.”

“Do you enjoy this job little elf?”

“I’ve enjoyed every minute of it. It’s opened me up to some crazy experiences.”

“Even being trapped under a pair of giant balls?”

“It was weird, but oddly satisfying.”

Frank reached into his beard and plucked the tiny elf out. He placed the diminutive man on his huge belly, along with his small plastic astray.

“Why don’t you pick up all those crumbs and dispose of them in the ashtray?”

Frank watched as Mike got to work. He could barely reach over the edge of the ashtray to drop the crumbs in.
1121.title: Frank keeps Mike in his beard

11212.content:
Once Mike had cleaned up all of the crumbs Frank moved the ashtray to the end table. As he did, his phone rang.

“Hey Bill, what’s up?”

“Frank... this will sound weird... but have you been visited by an elf too?”

“Sure have...”

“Okay, I thought I was crazy. I’ve been watching football for the last hour with a tiny man squirming between my toes wondering if I’d gone mad.”

“I thought I was crazy too. Or dreaming. You ready for training tomorrow?”

“I guess so, with the social distancing rules the kids sit six feet in front of us for the picture, and instead of talking to us fill out a small card with what they want for Christmas. Sounds like an easy gig.”

“Sounds good Bill, we can talk more on our smoke break tomorrow.”

Frank sat his phone back down.

“Sounds like Bill is really enjoying his elf in his toes,” Frank chuckled. “Speaking of which, I think it’s time to try you out in some different hiding places and see what feels best.”

Frank reached down and plucked up the little elf, placing him on his tongue and pulling him into his mouth. He placed a fresh Marlboro between his lips and lit it. As he took a drag he could feel the tiny man coughing on his tongue.

“This is nice. You’ll definitely take smoke baths in my mouth to and from work. But I won’t be able to smoke in the mall. Let’s try something else.”
11212.title: Frank puts Mike somewhere else

choices: Frank puts Mike on his member
112122.content:
“Bill seemed to think an elf belongs between the toes, and you mentioned you’d tried that before, so let’s see.”

Frank took Mike out of his mouth and reached down and stuck him between his big and second toe on his left foot. He propped his feet up on the coffee table so he could see him.

“Squirm around a little bit.”

As always, the elf moved on command.

“Oh, that does feel nice. Use your hands to massage while you do that.”

Frank watched as the tiny man used his whole body to massage Frank’s big toe. He took a drag from his cigarette and exhaled lazily as he enjoyed his massage.

“Get into it. Kiss, lick, nibble. Worship my toe.”

Frank watched as Mike began to kiss and nibble at his toe. The skin was rough and dry, so Frank found it felt incredible.

“You’ll definitely spend a lot of time between my toes. With ten, there’s a lot of massaging that needs to be done there. Let’s try something else.”

Frank stood up with the tiny man still stuck between his toes. He slipped his boxers off and sat back down. Frank fished Mike out from between his toes and sat down, and slid Mike under his hairy ball sack.

“You know the routine, massage away.”

This was the weirdest thing Frank had ever felt, but it was more than pleasurable. Frank got hard almost instantly.

“I think under my balls will be a good spot for you at home, but not at work. It’s a little too much.”

Frank pulled Mike out from under his balls, making sure the tiny man saw his huge, uncut 8 inch dick.

“Any Santas ever put you on their cock?” Frank asked bluntly.

“Almost all of them,” Mike replied. “Elves regularly become sex toys.”
112122.title: Toes

1121222.content:
“And I would’ve thought this was a more wholesome venture.”

“My guess would be it’s the power dynamic.”

“Sounds about right,” Frank replied. Frank lifted his right arm and placed the tiny elf in his armpit hair and closed his arm around him. Without having to tell him, Frank felt Mike start squirming, rubbing, and licking.

“Damn, that feels better than I would’ve guessed. I can’t believe you kept getting sent back to the North Pole.”

“I think for a lot of people the newness wears off, and they send us back. I’ve been kept as late as February, but always sent back.”

“Less talking, more armpit squirming little elf,” Frank chuckled. He lit a fresh cigarette and let it dangle from his lips as he reached down and fondled his now soft cock. He looked down at his phone and saw it was 11:30.

“Time to head to the cafe and get a little lunch.”

Frank pulled Mike out of his armpit and stuck him deep into his beard. He got dressed and headed out to his old pickup truck. He fished out the tiny elf and dropped him into his mouth. He lit a fresh cigarette and headed to the cafe.
1121222.title: Frank puts Mike somewhere else

11212221.content:
Frank pulled into the cafe and took a final drag off of his cigarette. He visualized the thick smoke coating the tiny elf before being sucked into his lungs, and the second hand smoke covering the little man as he blew it out of his pursed lips. He used his tongue to push Mike around as he got out of his truck and walked into the cafe.

“Hey Frank.”

“Hey Donna, slow day?” Frank asked, sliding into his favorite corner booth. His huge belly pushed the table, he barely fit.

“It’s always like this during Christmas season,” Donna replied, placing a cup of coffee and an ashtray down on the table. “How’s the mall Santa gig?”

“It starts tomorrow. Although I’ve been doing a little training with my personal elf today.”

“Elf?” Donna asked.

Frank reached into his mouth and plucked out the tiny man and sat him in the ashtray.

“Holy cow Frank... is that... is that a tiny man?”

Donna slid into the booth beside of Frank and stared into the ashtray. She couldn’t believe what she was seeing.

“It is. He’s an elf, apparently. He’s here to help me with my mall Santa gig.”
11212221.title: The cafe

Donna asks if she can put Mike between her toes
112122211.content:
“How’s he help you?”

“Makes sure I know what to say or do, and embody the Christmas spirit. I must say it’s been fun so far.”

Frank lit two cigarettes and passed one to Donna.

“Oh yeah, what kind of fun?”

“I’ve stuck him in my beard, on my belly, in between my toes, and in my mouth for a lot of smoke.”

Donna brought her cigarette over the ashtray and flicked her ash, she watched as the tiny man jumped out of the way.

“How’d he feel between your toes?” She asked.

Frank flicked his ash as well, but Mike wasn’t fast enough. He was covered in the gray, dust ashes.

“Oh, really nice. He massaged and kissed my big toe. He’s going back between them when I get home.”

“That sounds really fun.”

Donna brought her cigarette over the little man and made sure she didn’t miss this time. She stubbed her cigarette out right beside of him.
112122211.title: Donna inquires more

1121222111.content:
Donna watched as Mike jumped back from her giant cigarette butt, which was as tall as him. She brought her finger over him and pushed him down into the ashes and rolled him around.

“You want your usual Frank?” she asked, covering the tiny man in ash.

“Sounds good.”

Donna got up and headed towards the kitchen.

“Okay, she’s a little scary... and now I’m dirty.”

Frank reached down and plucked up the little elf. He slowly dipped him down into a cup of water a few times.

“I never drink the water.”

“Now I’m wet and cold!”

Frank took a napkin out of the dispenser and sat it on the table.

“Might as well lose the clothes.”

“Then I’ll be naked!”

Mike reluctantly agreed. He took his wet clothes off and dried himself with the napkin. Donna sat a plate down on the table.

“Two eggs over medium and buttered toast... oh, I see our little friend has gotten more comfy,” Donna giggled.

She walked off laughing to herself.

“You want some food?”

“No thanks, elves don’t have to eat. But I do feel awkward...”

“Lemme put you somewhere warmer.”

Frank picked up tiny Mike and stuck him deep in his beard.

14.content:
“I gotta take a whiz, tiny.”

Frank reached down and wrapped his fist around the diminutive man, and got up and headed to the bathroom. He sat tiny Mike down on the sink, and stood in front of the toilet and began to piss.

“This thing probably looks like a monster to you,” Frank laughed.

“I mean, it is huge...”

Mike wasn’t lying. At 8 inches Frank’s cock would easily tower over the elf.

Frank flushed the toilet and turned to the little man.

“Everything is huge at your size,” he chuckled.

Frank grabbed the tiny man and headed back into the living room. He plopped back down on the couch and opened his fist.

“Well damn, we missed a touchdown,” Frank said, grabbing a cigarette with his off hand and lighting it. He stood the freshly lit cigarette up in his hand beside of the elf.

“You’re no bigger than the filter!”

Smoke drifted down and caused Mike to cough again. Frank grinned before placing the cigarette between his lips to dangle. He tilted his hand causing the tiny man to slide back onto his mountainous belly,

info.brief_description: A mall Santa is gifted his own tiny elf
info.description: Frank has reluctantly taken the roll of mall Santa. The North Pole sends an elf - way smaller than Frank would’ve imagined - to help him with the gig.
